hero.title: Help Translate Adon ERP
hero.description: Join the Adon ERP translation community and help make the platform accessible in every language. Translators worldwide ensure Adon ERP works seamlessly for users in their native languages.

currentLanguages.title: Currently Supported Languages
currentLanguages.description: Adon ERP is available in multiple languages thanks to our global community of translators.

steps.title: Choose a language
steps.description: Select a language you want to help translate.

steps.title: Review strings
steps.description: Browse and translate text strings from the platform.

steps.title: Submit translations
steps.description: Submit your translations for review by the translation team.

steps.title: Get deployed
steps.description: Once approved, your translations ship with the next release.

contributeLanguages.title: Contribute to a Language
contributeLanguages.description: Help us reach more users by translating Adon ERP into your language.

guidelines.title: Translation Guidelines
points: Use context to choose the right words
